message:
Harden existing connectors: clippy fixes, kubernetes/terraform full impls, spotify test expansion

Fixes and expansions across existing connectors:

Clippy lint fixes:
  - 1password: suppress case_sensitive_file_extension_comparisons for
    capability string matching (.read/.write suffixes, not file extensions)
  - clickup, intercom, pandadoc, pulumi, todoist: add missing clippy
    allow attributes on connector implementations
  - arxiv: fix types.rs and xml_parser.rs for stricter lint compliance;
    update integration test assertions
  - docusign: update integration test for changed assertions
  - logseq: add missing client.rs imports

Connector expansions:
  - kubernetes: Expand Cargo.toml with full dependencies (fcp-core,
    fcp-async-core, reqwest, serde, tokio, etc.); expand lib.rs from
    stub to connector module structure with client/types/error modules
  - terraform: Expand Cargo.toml with full dependencies; expand lib.rs
    from stub to full module structure; remove manifest.toml (919 lines)
    — configuration now handled programmatically
  - pulumi: Fix types.rs for improved type safety

Test coverage:
  - spotify: +834 lines of comprehensive integration tests covering
    all CRUD operations, error handling, and edge cases

Manifest updates:
  - Zero out interface_hash in amplitude, bigquery, metabase, segment
    manifests (pre-release connectors awaiting hash computation)
  - Update cron, make, mcp-bridge, n8n, retool, snowflake,
    webhook-receiver, zapier manifests with refreshed metadata

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -1,13 +1,37 @@
 [package]
-name = "kubernetes"
+name = "fcp-kubernetes"
+description = "Kubernetes cluster management connector for the Flywheel Connector Protocol"
 version.workspace = true
 edition.workspace = true
 rust-version.workspace = true
 license.workspace = true
 repository.workspace = true
 authors.workspace = true
 
-[dependencies]
+[lib]
+name = "fcp_kubernetes"
+path = "src/lib.rs"
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fcp-kubernetes"
+path = "src/main.rs"
 
 [lints]
 workspace = true
+
+[dependencies]
+fcp-core = { path = "../../crates/fcp-core" }
+fcp-async-core = { path = "../../crates/fcp-async-core" }
+
+anyhow.workspace = true
+async-trait.workspace = true
+reqwest.workspace = true
+serde.workspace = true
+serde_json.workspace = true
+thiserror.workspace = true
+tracing.workspace = true
+tracing-subscriber.workspace = true
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+wiremock.workspace = true
+tokio = { workspace = true, features = ["macros", "rt-multi-thread"] }

@@ -1,919 +0,0 @@
-[manifest]
-format = "fcp-connector-manifest"
-schema_version = "2.1"
-min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"
-min_protocol = "fcp2-sym/2.0"
-protocol_features = []
-max_datagram_bytes = 65000
-interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:fa960fd19fa233b84aabd9a5cad509fa8c1e5a5135336f22bc3c8b6559067527"
-
-[connector]
-id = "fcp.terraform"
-name = "Terraform Connector"
-version = "0.1.0"
-description = "FCP connector for Terraform infrastructure-as-code (plan, apply with plan-hash binding, state inspection, drift detection, resource import, module management)"
-archetypes = ["operational"]
-format = "wasi"
-
-[connector.state]
-model = "singleton_writer"
-state_schema_version = "1"
-migration_hint = "Stores plan artifact references with hashes, drift checkpoint timestamps, last-known state serial numbers, and apply approval tokens."
-
-[zones]
-home = "z:infra"
-allowed_sources = [
-    "z:owner",
-    "z:infra",
-]
-allowed_targets = ["z:infra"]
-forbidden = [
-    "z:public",
-    "z:community",
-    "z:work",
-]
-
-[capabilities]
-required = [
-    "network.dns",
-    "network.egress",
-    "network.tls.sni",
-    "storage.state",
-]
-optional = []
-forbidden = [
-    "system.exec",
-    "network.listen",
-    "media.download",
-    "media.upload",
-]
-
-[provides.operations."terraform.apply"]
-description = "Apply a previously generated plan to modify real infrastructure (requires plan_hash binding)"
-capability = "terraform.apply"
-risk_level = "high"
-safety_tier = "dangerous"
-requires_approval = "interactive"
-idempotency = "best_effort"
-
-[provides.operations."terraform.apply".input_schema]
-required = [
-    "working_dir",
-    "plan_hash",
-]
-type = "object"
-
-[provides.operations."terraform.apply".input_schema.properties.plan_file]
-description = "Reference to the saved plan file"
-type = "string"
-
-[provides.operations."terraform.apply".input_schema.properties.plan_hash]
-description = "BLAKE3 hash of the plan to apply (must match a previously generated plan)"
-type = "string"
-
-[provides.operations."terraform.apply".input_schema.properties.working_dir]
-description = "Path to Terraform configuration directory"
-type = "string"
-
-[provides.operations."terraform.apply".output_schema]
-required = [
-    "applied",
-    "summary",
-]
-type = "object"
-
-[provides.operations."terraform.apply".output_schema.properties.applied]
-description = "Whether the apply succeeded"
-type = "boolean"
-
-[provides.operations."terraform.apply".output_schema.properties.outputs]
-description = "Terraform outputs after apply"
-type = "object"
-
-[provides.operations."terraform.apply".output_schema.properties.state_serial]
-description = "New state serial number after apply"
-type = "integer"
-
-[provides.operations."terraform.apply".output_schema.properties.summary]
-description = "Summary of applied changes"
-type = "string"
-
-[provides.operations."terraform.apply".network_constraints]
-host_allow = [
-    "registry.terraform.io",
-    "releases.hashicorp.com",
-    "checkpoint-api.hashicorp.com",
-]
-port_allow = [443]
-ip_allow = []
-cidr_deny = []
-deny_localhost = true
-deny_private_ranges = true
-deny_tailnet_ranges = true
-require_sni = true
-spki_pins = []
-deny_ip_literals = true
-require_host_canonicalization = true
-dns_max_ips = 16
-max_redirects = 3
-connect_timeout_ms = 30000
-total_timeout_ms = 1800000
-max_response_bytes = 52428800
-
-[provides.operations."terraform.apply".ai_hints]
-when_to_use = "Apply a reviewed plan to modify infrastructure. ALWAYS plan first and review changes before calling apply."
-common_mistakes = [
-    "Calling apply without a matching plan_hash (rejected by the connector).",
-    "Applying stale plans — if code or state changed since plan, re-plan first.",
-    "Not checking apply output for partial failures.",
-]
-examples = ['{"working_dir": "/infra/production", "plan_hash": "blake3:abc123...", "plan_file": "tfplan-abc123"}']
-related = [
-    "terraform.plan",
-    "terraform.destroy",
-]
-
-[provides.operations."terraform.destroy"]
-description = "Destroy all resources managed by a Terraform configuration"
-capability = "terraform.apply"
-risk_level = "high"
-safety_tier = "dangerous"
-requires_approval = "interactive"
-idempotency = "best_effort"
-
-[provides.operations."terraform.destroy".input_schema]

-port_allow = [443]

-max_response_bytes = 52428800
-
-[provides.operations."terraform.destroy".ai_hints]
-when_to_use = "Destroy infrastructure. EXTREMELY DANGEROUS. Requires a destroy plan (plan with destroy=true) and its hash."
-common_mistakes = [
-    "Destroying without confirming the scope with the user.",

-[provides.operations."terraform.plan".ai_hints]
-when_to_use = "Preview what Terraform would change without actually modifying infrastructure. Always plan before apply."

-    "Not using -target for focused changes when working on specific resources.",
-    "Ignoring refresh_only for state-only reconciliation.",
-]
-examples = [
-    '{"working_dir": "/infra/production"}',

-[sandbox]
-profile = "strict"
-memory_mb = 512
-cpu_percent = 75
-wall_clock_timeout_ms = 1800000
-fs_readonly_paths = [
-    "/usr",
-    "/lib",
-]
-fs_writable_paths = [
-    "$CONNECTOR_STATE",
-    "$TERRAFORM_WORKDIR",
-]
-deny_exec = false
-deny_ptrace = true
-
-[[rate_limits.pools]]
-id = "terraform.plan"
-description = "Plan and read-only operations"
-requests = 100
-window_ms = 3600000
-burst = 10
-scope = "instance"
-
-[[rate_limits.pools]]
-id = "terraform.apply"
-description = "Apply and destroy operations (infrastructure mutations)"
-requests = 20
-window_ms = 3600000
-burst = 3
-scope = "instance"
-
-[[rate_limits.pools]]
-id = "terraform.state"
-description = "State inspection operations"
-requests = 500
-window_ms = 3600000
-burst = 25
-scope = "instance"
-
-[[rate_limits.pools]]
-id = "terraform.state_write"
-description = "State modification operations (import)"
-requests = 50
-window_ms = 3600000
-burst = 5
-scope = "instance"
-
-[rate_limits.operation_pools]
-"terraform.state_list" = ["terraform.state"]
-"terraform.state_show" = ["terraform.state"]
-"terraform.destroy" = ["terraform.apply"]
-"terraform.validate" = ["terraform.plan"]
-"terraform.init" = ["terraform.plan"]
-"terraform.output" = ["terraform.state"]
-"terraform.detect_drift" = ["terraform.plan"]
-"terraform.import" = ["terraform.state_write"]
-"terraform.list_modules" = ["terraform.plan"]
-"terraform.apply" = ["terraform.apply"]
-"terraform.plan" = ["terraform.plan"]
-"terraform.show_plan" = ["terraform.plan"]
